title: Sienna Glass Spirit Ball, Multi-Colour Turquoise, 11 x 11 x 14 cm
features: Mouth blown glass spirit ball with hanging ribbon
Beautifully gift packaged, with gift tag and explanation
description: Product Description This beautiful multi-coloured turquoise glass spirit ball from Sienna Glass makes a perfect keepsake gift for any special occasion. Each ball is unique as it is hand blown by craftsmen. They can be hung indoors in a window or bright place or in the garden, or on a stand anywhere that the sun will catch the vibrant colours. Measuring approx. 10cm across, the ball comes with a hanging ribbon and is packaged in a gift box including a gift tag with a brief explanation of the meaning behind friendship balls. Safety Warning Warning: This product contains small parts that may pose a choking hazard. Keep out of reach of children. Do not hang where it can be easily broken. Avoid placing in direct sunlight or near heat sources.
